chat.aiAssistantIntro: I'm your AI symptom checker. Describe how you're feeling and I'll help you understand what might be going on.

suggestions.stomachPainDesc: Abdominal pain, nausea, or digestive issues

medical.disclaimer: This is not medical advice. Please consult a healthcare professional.

errors.sendFailed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

generateQuestions.name: Generate Questions
generateQuestions.description: Creating initial questions about your symptoms
generateQuestions.tooltip: The system analyzes your initial description and creates relevant questions to better understand your symptoms. This helps gather the information needed for an accurate assessment.

collectAnswers.name: Collect Answers
collectAnswers.tooltip: Your answers to the initial questions are being collected and organized. This information will be used to start building a picture of your health situation.

generateDdx.name: Analyze Symptoms
generateDdx.tooltip: Based on your symptoms and answers, the system is analyzing possible conditions that might explain what you're experiencing. This creates an initial list of considerations.

refinementQuestion.name: Follow-up Question
refinementQuestion.tooltip: To narrow down the possibilities, the system generates targeted follow-up questions. These help distinguish between similar conditions and improve accuracy.

collectRefinementAnswer.name: Collect Response
collectRefinementAnswer.tooltip: Your response to the follow-up question is being processed. This additional information helps refine the assessment.

refineDdx.name: Refine Analysis
refineDdx.tooltip: Using your latest response, the system updates its analysis. This may lead to more follow-up questions or proceed to the final summary if enough information has been gathered.

finalSummary.name: Final Summary
finalSummary.tooltip: All information has been gathered and analyzed. The system is now preparing a comprehensive summary of findings and recommendations for you to review.
